title: Silverhook BIG31 Big Boy Plastic Flexi Filler 250ml
features: Big Boy Flexible Plastic for Car Bumpers etc.
Grips to Wide Range of Surfaces
description: From the manufacturer Big Boy Plastic Flexi Filler High elasticity & gripping ability Excellent adhesion to plastic Easy application 250ml Available Silverhook Flexible Plastic Filler offers easy application for the repair of dented and damaged plastic bumpers. Flexi Plastic has excellent sanding properties even after leaving overnight. Flexi Plastic is a two-component putty characterised by its high elasticity and gripping ability to a wide range of surfaces. Due to its flexible properties, Flexi Plastic can also be used as a general purpose filler on ABS, PVR, PVC, GRP, Aluminium, and Wood. As the filler is corrosion-resistant it makes a perfect exterior filler on areas requiring a paint finish e.g. window frames etc. Step 1 Ensure surface to be filled is free from grease and loose dirt. Brush off surface dust with damp cloth and leave to dry. Step 2 Mix the filler with hardener in the ratio supplied, (e.g. half tin of filler - half a tube of hardener) thoroughly to obtain a uniform colour. Step 3 Apply mixture immediately with firm pressure using spreader and build up to required level. Paste will start to harden within 5 minutes. Note: Hardening times will vary. Step 4 Leave to set for approximately 1 hour. Once dry surface can be sanded and wiped over.
